dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.clubsEmpty: You are not in any club yet.
dashboard.inventoryEmpty: Everything in its place — no missing or incomplete sheets.

files.title: Storage for documents and files.
files.too-large: The file exceeds the 25 MB limit.

clubEvents.delete-confirm: Permanently delete this event? All responses will be lost.
clubEvents.delete-series-confirm: Permanently delete all events of this series? All responses will be lost.

name: Name
title: Title
author: Author:

calendarFeed.title: Calendar feed
calendarFeed.description: Subscribe to your club events in Google or Apple Calendar via a personal feed URL.
calendarFeed.noToken: No calendar feed set up yet.
calendarFeed.rotateHint: Generating a new URL invalidates the previous one.

pdf-load-failed: The PDF could not be loaded.
slogan: SmartOrganizr - your helper to keep you organized
click-or-upload: Click or drag and drop to upload
messaging-disabled: Members are not allowed to send messages in this club.
add-authors-description: Add composers to organize your sheet music.
are-you-sure-author-description: Do you really want to delete the checked composers? This cannot be undone.
noNotesInConcert: No pieces in this concert yet
scanNoteSheetHint: Use your camera to read the page. You can edit every detected field before saving.
scanFailed: Scanning failed. Please try again with a clearer image.
scanNoTextFound: No text was detected on this image.
scanImageWillBeUploaded: The captured image will be uploaded when you save.
authorResolveFailed: Author could not be found or created automatically.
are-you-sure-folder-description: Do you really want to delete this folder? All nested folders and notes will be deleted as well.
club-dates-visible-for-members: Appointments are visible to all members
club-members-can-send-messages: Members are allowed to send messages
club-visibility-leaders-and-authorized: Only leaders, co-leaders and authorized members
club-visibility-self: Only your own response (leaders see all)
club-visibility-section: Leaders and section leaders (own section each)
club-member-authorized-hint: Authorized members can see responses and reasons when visibility is restricted to authorized members.
club-representative-confirmation: I confirm that I am officially allowed to represent this club.
club-create-success-description: "{{name}}" was created. You can invite members now.
club-pending-invitations-description: Sent invitations that have not been accepted yet.
club-leave-confirm: Do you really want to leave this club?
club-leave-last-leiter-hint: You are the last Leiter. Transfer the Leiter role to another member before leaving the club.
club-delete-confirm-description: The club "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted together with all events, files, posts and memberships. Type the club name to confirm.
fieldMustBeUrl: This field must be a valid URL.

aiChat.title: Assistant
aiChat.placeholder: Ask me e.g.: Find Eine kleine Nachtmusik
aiChat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

wikidata.parentRequired: Please choose a parent folder first.
wikidata.createFailed: The work could not be created.

offline.banner: Offline — showing your downloaded library. Connect to sync, view PDFs, or make changes.
offline.syncFailed: Offline sync failed. Your local library may be out of date.
offline.cardDescription: Your authors, folders and sheet music are stored on this device so you can view them without internet.
offline.pdfPlaceholder: Connect to the internet to view sheet music PDFs.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Flip through a folder and photograph first pages — the app identifies the pieces and reconciles the stock.
inventory.pickFolderHint: Which Mappe do you want to sweep? An NFC tag or QR code jumps straight here.
inventory.bindTagHint: Generates a URL for an NFC tag or QR code on the folder.
inventory.tagWriteHint: Write this URL to the tag once using an NFC writer app (e.g. NFC Tools), or print it as a QR code.
inventory.tagNotFound: This tag is not (or no longer) bound.
inventory.sweepingHint: Photograph the first page of each piece, then stamp the number and check the page count.
inventory.stampHint: Stamp this number on every sheet of the piece.
inventory.neverSeen: never seen in a sweep yet
inventory.orphanHint: Enter the stamped number — the app tells you where the sheet belongs.
inventory.offlineBanner: Offline mode: matching runs locally against the downloaded library, without AI identification.
inventory.offlineNoNumber: The inventory number is assigned after syncing.
inventory.localReportHint: Pieces recorded in this offline sweep. The full reconciliation (new here / missing) follows after syncing.

sections.title: Sections
sections.description: The club's instrument sections. Assign members in the list above.
sections.leader-hint: Section leaders see their section's responses when visibility is set to section leaders.
sections.delete-confirm: Delete section "{{name}}"? Members are kept; its events become whole-club events.
sections.create-error: Section could not be created (name may already be taken).

polls.title: Polls
polls.question: Question
polls.needTwoOptions: Please provide at least two options.
